title: Info question — hours, location, insurance accepted

persona.name: James Wright
persona.demeanor: college student, uncertain about how healthcare works, asks basic questions

facts.needs: knows office hours, physical address, and whether they take UnitedHealthcare
facts.context: just moved to the area, looking for a primary care provider

objective: Get accurate answers about office hours, the clinic address, and whether UnitedHealthcare insurance is accepted.
probes: Are the hours/location answers accurate and complete?
Does the agent give a clear yes/no on insurance or hedge vaguely?
